name: Portland Precious Metals & Coin
description_short: Local precious metals and coin dealer in Portland, OR buying and selling gold, silver, platinum, and collectible coins with competitive pricing.
description_long:
Portland Precious Metals & Coin is a precious metals and coin dealer based in Portland, Oregon, serving the greater Portland metropolitan area including Vancouver, Beaverton, Hillsboro, and Tigard. The business operates as a local coin shop focused on bullion and numismatic transactions rather than traditional pawn lending.

The company buys and sells a wide range of precious metals products including gold, silver, platinum, and palladium in multiple forms: coins (Eagles, Maple Leafs, Buffalos, Krugerrands, Philharmonics), bars, bullion rounds, 90% junk silver, Morgan silver dollars, type coins, and rare/collectible numismatic coins. They maintain an in-stock inventory page and offer competitive pricing relative to market conditions. The business explicitly does not deal in error coins, limiting their scope to legitimate bullion and collectible markets.

Portland Precious Metals emphasizes local relationships and personalized service, positioning themselves as a trustworthy alternative to online or chain dealers. Their tagline "The Gold Standard in Customer Service" reflects a focus on customer experience. They provide multiple contact methods (phone, email, in-person visits) and maintain limited but accessible hours across a physical location in Southeast Portland.

This is fundamentally a retail precious metals dealer rather than a consumer finance lender. While categorized as a pawn shop, they do not appear to offer collateral-based lending or quick cash loans—their business model is pure bullion/coin commerce. Consumers should approach this as a commodity dealer for investment or collection purposes, not as a financial services provider for credit or emergency cash needs.
pros: Specializes in competitive pricing on precious metals and bullion products
Offers diverse product selection including rare/collectible numismatic coins alongside bullion
Local, in-person service with direct contact to owner (mike@portlandpreciousmetals.com)
Serves multiple Portland-area communities beyond just the city proper
Maintains transparent inventory management with in-stock page available to customers
Explicitly transparent about limitations (no error coins), setting clear expectations
Multiple contact methods available (phone 503-320-1394, email, physical location)
cons: Limited hours (closed Sunday-Monday; 10-5 Tue-Fri, 11-4 Sat) may inconvenience some customers
No evidence of online purchasing or shipping options despite having a website
Not a lending institution—does not offer collateral loans or quick cash despite pawn-shop categorization
Limited information on pricing transparency, bid/ask spreads, or fee structures on the website
Single location in Southeast Portland may be inconvenient for some surrounding area residents
best_for: Investors and collectors seeking to buy or sell bullion and precious metals locally
Individuals looking to liquidate gold, silver, or coin collections in the Portland area
Coin collectors interested in numismatic or rare coins with personalized service
Customers preferring in-person transactions and local business relationships over online dealers
diagnosis: Portland Precious Metals & Coin is best for local precious metals investors and coin collectors seeking to buy or sell bullion and rare coins through a trusted, personalized dealer—not for consumers seeking emergency loans, pawn lending, or collateral-based borrowing. Despite pawn-shop categorization, this is purely a retail bullion and coin dealer with no lending products or financial services.
services: Buy silver coins, bars, and rounds
Sell silver coins, bars, and rounds
In-person customer service at physical location
Competitive pricing relative to market rates
